news.headline: Boeing faces lawsuit after whistle-blower's suicide. Family blames company for John Barnett's death.
news.summary: A legal case has been filed asserting that Boeing is accountable for the passing of John Barnett, who had expressed safety apprehensions.

VOC Energy Trust files 2024 Annual Report on Form 10-K on March 20, 2025. Available on SEC and Trust website.
news.summary: In Houston, the VOC Energy Trust (NYSE: VOC) recently filed its Annual Report for the year ending December 31, 2024 on March 20, 2025, with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC). The report, available on both the Trust's website and the SEC's site, offers comprehensive information regarding the Trust's financial performance and operations. Investors can access the report online or request a physical copy for review. For further details, visit http://voc.q4web.com/home/default.aspx or www.sec.gov.

news.headline: Secure Workspaces Distribution launches Peak Performance Partner Program for software and hardware distribution, benefiting IT business community.
news.summary: In Sacramento, California, on March 20, 2025, Secure Workspaces Distribution (SWD) introduced the Peak Performance Partner Program for software and hardware distribution. This initiative presents a chance for the IT sector and companies of all sizes to obtain secure technologies.

news.headline: Citadel's Wellington Fund decreases nearly 1% year on year: Source
VIQ Solutions ends strategic review process with board change. TSX: VQS provider of digital voice/video services.
news.summary: VIQ Solutions Inc., a global provider of secure digital voice and video capture technology, and transcription services, based in Mississauga, Ontario, has completed its strategic review process. The review, initiated on February 3, 2025, was led by a special committee of the company's board of directors. VIQ Solutions is listed on the TSX under the symbol VQS.

news.headline: Speculators scale back 2025 rate-cut bets as inflation fears rise ahead of March Fed meeting. Most favored scenario now foresees two cuts at 24% probability. Fed signals two cuts in 2025. Retail bettors cautious, financial markets slightly more hopeful.
news.summary: Speculators are reevaluating their expectations for Federal Reserve interest rate cuts in 2025, with a focus on the March Federal Open Market Committee meeting. Traders on the Kalshi platform are moving their bets towards fewer than three rate cuts, particularly favoring the scenario of two cuts with a 24% implied probability. The chances of only one rate cut have increased to 19%. Retail bettors are also leaning towards two rate cuts, with a 24% implied probability. In December, the Fed's "dot plot" showed a median expectation of two rate cuts for 2025, down from four in September. While retail bettors are becoming more conservative, broader financial markets are still slightly more optimistic. Fed funds futures on the CME FedWatch tool currently indicate a full pricing of three rate cuts by December 2024, with a 35% probability.

news.headline: Economic fears rise as uncertainty plagues markets. Index shows concerns but 5 recession-proof stocks remain strong.
news.summary: The market is facing uncertainty with souring sentiment data as markets tumble and tariff policies lack consistency. The St Louis Fed's US Economic Policy Uncertainty Index hit its highest level since December 2020 while the University of Michigan Survey of Consumers dropped nearly 10% from January to February and is down 17% year-over-year. The NFIB Small Business Optimism Index fell, and the NFIB Uncertainty Index rose to its second-highest recorded level, mentioning tariff uncertainty. Inflation expectations for 2025 are rising, putting pressure on the Federal Reserve to balance growth and price stability. U.S. stocks are lagging global markets, causing investor unease. Five stocks with solid fundamentals in sectors that perform well during economic slowdowns are suggested. Republic Services Inc. is highlighted for its waste management services, contrasting its performance with Waste Management Inc. (NYSE:WM). Republic Services (NYSE:RSG) offers integrated waste services with competitive financial ratios and a stock increase of over 27% in the last 12 months. The article recommends keeping an eye on Republic Services Inc. due to positive momentum and quality metrics.

news.headline: vTv Therapeutics reveals 2024 Q4 and full year financial results, with a corporate update included.
New CEO's first full quarter at Nike sees sales decline below expectations, but less severe than feared.
Transcontinental Realty Investors, Inc. posts earnings: Net income $0.1 million in Q4 2024, up from $2.6 million loss in Q4 2023. Total occupancy 81%.
news.summary: Transcontinental Realty Investors, Inc. (NYSE:TCI) has released its financial results for the quarter ending December 31, 2024. During this period, the company reported a net income attributable to common shares amounting to $0.1 million or $0.01 per diluted share. This is in comparison to a net loss of $2.6 million or $0.30 per diluted share for the same quarter in 2023. Notably, the total occupancy rate stood at 81% as of December 31, 2024, with the multifa... unit occupancy rate being at 94%.

news.headline: American Realty Investors, Inc. reports net loss of $0.2 million in Q4 2024, improved from $2.1 million in Q4 2023; total occupancy at 81%.
news.summary: In Dallas, American Realty Investors, Inc. (NYSE:ARL) has released its financial performance for the quarter ending December 31, 2024. During this period, there was a net loss attributable to common shares of $0.2 million, translating to $0.01 per diluted share. This is an improvement compared to the net loss of $2.1 million, equivalent to $0.13 per diluted share, reported for the same quarter in 2023. As of December 31, 2024, the total occupancy rate stood at 81%.

news.headline: Mayor Bowser selects Therme Group to develop Wellness Destination at Poplar Point, 15 acres for project, to boost economic growth.
news.summary: In Washington, Mayor Muriel Bowser and the Office of the Deputy Mayor for Planning and Economic Development revealed the selection of Therme Group's proposal to introduce Therme DC at Poplar Point in Ward 8. This project involves developing 15 acres of the 110-acre area into a cutting-edge health and wellbeing facility. The initiative aims to provide a distinctive experience for visitors and drive economic advancement along the waterfront. Therme Group's proposal stands out as the chosen plan to transform the designated area into a vibrant destination.

news.headline: Income Opportunity Realty Investors, Inc. reports $1.1 million net income for quarter ended Dec 31, 2024, down from $2.5 million in 2023.
news.summary: Income Opportunity Realty Investors, Inc. (NYSE American: IOR) announced its quarterly financial results for the period ending December 31, 2024. During this quarter, the company reported a net income attributable to common shares of $1.1 million, equivalent to $0.27 per diluted share. This is a decrease from the net income of $2.5 million, or $0.60 per share, recorded during the same period in 2023. The decline in net income is primarily due to a decrease in interest income, partially offset by an increase in another source of revenue.

news.headline: Markets plunge with Nasdaq leading losses; Nvidia drops as CEO speaks. Dow and Nasdaq down. Source: Investor's Business Daily.
news.summary: On Tuesday, the Nasdaq composite experienced the most significant decrease among the major stock market indexes. The Dow Jones also saw a notable decline. Nvidia faced a drop in its stock value as CEO Huang addressed a conference. Live coverage of the market events was provided by Investor's Business Daily.

news.headline: Lennar Corp (NYSE:LEN) beats analyst expectation with quarterly earnings of $2.14/share, reports $7.63 billion in revenue. New orders increase by 1% to 18,355 homes, with a dollar value decrease of 4% to $7.4 billion.
news.summary: Lennar Corp. (NYSE:LEN) released its first-quarter earnings report, exceeding expectations. The company reported earnings of $2.14 per share, surpassing the analyst consensus of $1.73. Quarterly GAAP revenue stood at $7.63 billion, beating the consensus estimate of $7.43 billion. Key highlights include a 1% increase in new orders to 18,355 homes, however, the dollar value for new orders decreased by 4% to $7.4 billion. Additionally, the backlog consisted of 13,145 homes. For more details, the full story is available on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: MV Oil Trust filed its 2024 Annual Report on Form 10-K with the SEC, available online, for unitholders.
news.summary: Houston-based MV Oil Trust (NYSE: MVO) submitted its Annual Report on Form 10-K for the period ending December 31, 2024 to the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission on March 20, 2025. This report can be accessed on the company's website, http://mvo.q4web.com/home/default.aspx, and the SEC's website, www.sec.gov. Shareholders are able to request a printed copy of the report as well.

news.headline: PropStream partners with BeachesMLS to help members with lead generation. Streamlining efforts for better results.
news.summary: PropStream, a company based in Lake Forest, California, has recently partnered with BeachesMLS. This collaboration aims to provide a refined lead generation solution for members of BeachesMLS. The partnership is set to enhance efficiency in lead generation activities through a vetted approach. This initiative is significant for the members of BeachesMLS as it offers them a reliable and streamlined process to boost their lead generation efforts. This new partnership is anticipated to greatly benefit the members of BeachesMLS and improve their overall lead generation mechanism.

news.headline: Guardian Capital corrects distribution for Guardian Ultra-Short U.S. T-Bill Fund to USD$0.1725 per ETF unit.
news.summary: Guardian Capital LP confirmed today that the distribution for Guardian Ultra-Short U.S. T-Bill Fund (TSX: GUTB.U) was inaccurately stated in Canadian dollars in the press release on March 17, 2025. As the Fund's units are in U.S. dollars, the accurate distribution is USD$0.1725 per ETF unit. Important dates for the distribution including the ex-dividend date, record date, and payment date remain the same.

news.headline: Lithium Royalty Corp. plans substantial issuer bid to purchase up to C$7 million of its common shares at C$4.50 - C$5.20 per share.
news.summary: Lithium Royalty Corp. (TSX: LIRC) has disclosed its plans for a significant issuer bid, aiming to buy back a total of up to C$7 million worth of its common shares. The bid, known as the "Offer," will involve purchasing Shares at a set price ranging between C$4.50 and C$5.20 per Share through a "modified Dutch auction" process. Shareholders are invited to participate in this initiative by selling back their Shares for cash.

news.headline: SGS in North America achieves ANAB accreditation for ISO 45001:2018, ensuring OHS standards.
news.summary: A company based in Bloomfield, New Jersey, announced on March 20, 2025, that SGS, a globally renowned firm specializing in testing, inspection, and certification services, has successfully obtained accreditation from the ANSI National Accreditation Board (ANAB) for ISO 45001:2018 Occupational Health & Safety Management Systems. This achievement signifies that SGS has met the necessary standards to ensure workplace health and safety compliance.

news.headline: Eupraxia Pharmaceuticals discloses Q4 2024 financial results. (NASDAQ:EPRX) (TSX:EPRX).
news.summary: On March 20, 2025, in Victoria, BC, Eupraxia Pharmaceuticals Inc. (NASDAQ: EPRX, TSX: EPRX) announced its innovative DiffuSphere™ technology that enhances drug delivery efficacy in various applications. Eupraxia is a leading clinical-stage biotechnology company leveraging this technology to improve drug administration.

news.headline: BYUtv wins 2 Children's and Family Emmy Awards out of 11 nominations for series like "Malory Towers" and "A Kind of Spark."
news.summary: BYUtv, based in Provo, Utah, recently announced the nomination of several series for awards, including "Malory Towers," "All-Round Champion," "A Kind of Spark," and "Ruby and the Well." The network, known for providing uplifting family content, celebrated two wins at the 2025 event. BYUtv is accessible for free through streaming services and cable or satellite options.

news.headline: DARZALEX excels in multiple myeloma treatment, showing strong market potential and growth prospects in various patient segments.
news.summary: DARZALEX, a prominent monoclonal antibody for treating multiple myeloma, is showing promising market prospects. Its approval in a range of combinations for newly diagnosed and relapsed/refractory patients has broadened its usage. The market for multiple myeloma is projected to show continuous growth, with significant potential for expansion.

news.headline: Disclosure: A close associate of a Millicom (Tigo) Director made a transaction.
news.summary: As per recent updates, the United States reported a total of 35,000 new cases of COVID-19 in the past 24 hours, bringing the total number of cases in the country to 3.2 million. Additionally, there were 800 new deaths recorded, pushing the total death toll to 135,000. The surge in cases has prompted several states to reimpose restrictions and mandates in an effort to curb the spread of the virus. Authorities are emphasizing the importance of following guidelines such as wearing masks, practicing social distancing, and frequently washing hands to prevent further transmission. Despite ongoing efforts to contain the virus, the situation remains fluid and unpredictable, highlighting the need for continued vigilance and adherence to safety measures.

news.headline: BlytzPay honored at Automotive Intelligence Awards for innovative contributions to the automotive sector. #leadingplatform.
news.summary: BlytzPay, a prominent collections management platform, has been honored at the inaugural Automotive Intelligence Awards for its groundbreaking work in the automotive sector. The company's platform, known for improving payment processing and customer engagement, secured recognition for its innovative contributions.

news.headline: Heather Croner Real Estate Sotheby's International Realty merges with William Pitt Sotheby's International Realty in Millbrook, NY. (# of clients)
news.summary: Two leading real estate companies have joined forces to cater to clients in the Hudson Valley area, with their headquarters in Millbrook, New York. The collaboration between Heather Croner Real Estate and Sotheby's International Realty aims to provide top-notch services to buyers and sellers. The announcement was made on March 20, 2025, through a press release on PRNewswire-PRWeb. This partnership is set to offer a luxurious real estate experience, combining the expertise of both firms to better serve their clientele.

news.headline: Juniper Communities partners with NHI on Paramus, NJ senior living community in strategic real estate investment move.
news.summary: Juniper Communities, a prominent provider of senior living facilities, has established a strategic collaboration with National Health Investors, Inc., a top real estate investment trust traded on the NYSE under the symbol NHI. National Health Investors focuses on various real estate investment strategies such as sale-leaseback, joint-venture, mortgage, and mezzanine financing.

news.headline: Face Addiction Now introduces new Michigan Substance Use and Recovery Data Dashboard to track trends. Clinton Township, March 20, 2025.
news.summary: A new interactive "Michigan Substance Use and Recovery Data Dashboard" is being introduced by Face Addiction Now (FAN). This powerful tool aims to offer crucial insights into substance use and mental health trends in Michigan. The initiative, based in Clinton Township, Michigan, was launched on March 20, 2025. This dashboard provides comprehensive data analysis for monitoring trends and patterns related to substance use and mental health across the state.

news.headline: Content Catalyst's Analyst Firm Survey 2025: Analyst firms use AI to navigate economic challenges. Released in CAMBRIDGE, UK on March 20, 2025.
news.summary: Today, Content Catalyst unveiled results from its Analyst Firm Survey 2025, shedding light on how research firms are managing economic challenges and utilizing AI to improve their offerings. The report was disclosed in Cambridge, United Kingdom on March 20, 2025. Significant details from the survey include valuable insights into the strategies adopted by these firms in response to the uncertain economic climate. This data provides a comprehensive understanding of the industry's approach towards AI integration for service enhancement.

news.headline: "Tasting Italy with Roberto Serrini" wins two Taste Awards - Best New Food and Travel Series & RB Cellars Award. Los Angeles, March 20, 2025 - PRNewswire.
news.summary: Renowned food and travel show Tasting Italy with Roberto Serrini recently won two esteemed Taste Awards. The series clinched the titles of Best New Food and Travel Series as well as the premier RB Cellars Award for Best Branded Content. The awards were received this month in Los Angeles. The show has garnered significant recognition for its exceptional content, making it a standout in the industry.

news.headline: Franchise FastLane partners with Sourdough & Co. for franchise expansion; #1 franchise sales org in U.S. OMAHA, Neb., March 20, 2025.
news.summary: A leading franchise sales organization in the United States has collaborated with a sandwich, soup, and salad concept for its initial fast-casual food service partnership. Franchise FastLane, known as the top franchise acceleration and development company in the country, recently made this move. The partnership was announced in Omaha, Nebraska, on March 20, 2025, as Sourdough became the chosen food concept.

news.headline: Only 1% of frontline workers report never facing customer incivility; 72% struggle with difficult behavior.
news.summary: A recent survey conducted by Axonify revealed significant training gaps, with 72% of frontline workers facing challenges in handling a growing number of difficult customer interactions. The study, based in Waterloo, ON and dated March 20, 2025, indicates that as the prices of essential products surge, frontline staff are struggling to effectively address challenging customer behaviors.

news.headline: Miami MSA ranked #2 top housing market in US for 2025, with median prices of $1 million+ homes and existing condos rising year-over-year in February.
news.summary: The median prices for single-family homes and existing condos priced at $1 million and above in Miami-Dade County showed a year-over-year increase in February 2025. This data comes from the MIAMI Association of Realtors (MIAMI). The Miami Metropolitan Statistical Area (MSA) was recently ranked as the second top housing market in the United States.

news.headline: Krisp launched SDK to enhance AI voice agents, improving speech recognition and turn-taking. (Characters: 95)
news.summary: Krisp, a leading voice AI technology company based in Berkeley, California, revealed their latest software development kit (SDK) on March 20, 2025. This new SDK aims to enhance speech recognition accuracy by eliminating background noise and focusing on individual voices. By improving turn-taking and interrupt-handling, the AI voice agents can now respond more efficiently. This innovation is a significant step towards advancing communication technology.

news.headline: Commercial Credit Group Inc. closes its 19th term ABS worth $477,170,000, their largest asset-backed transaction to date.
news.summary: A commercial equipment finance company based in Charlotte has recently finalized its largest asset-backed transaction to date, contributing to its ongoing expansion. Commercial Credit Group Inc. (CCG), headquartered in Charlotte, North Carolina, achieved this milestone on March 20, 2025. This development marks a significant step forward for CCG, a prominent player in the independent commercial equipment finance sector.

news.headline: Cloud Latitude launches Private Equity Portfolio Enhancement Program to optimize IT and drive cost efficiency.
news.summary: Cloud Latitude has launched a new initiative, the Private Equity Portfolio Enhancement Program, aiming to assist private equity firms in enhancing IT, cloud adoption, and operational performance. The program is strategically structured to boost cost efficiency and bolster portfolio valuation. The announcement was made in Vero Beach, Florida on March 20, 2025.

news.headline: Infraday California 2025 in Los Angeles will bring together top infrastructure leaders to address challenges like advanced mobility and sustainable water management.
news.summary: In 2025, Infraday California presents an opportunity for collaboration between public and private sectors to address major infrastructure issues in the state. This event will focus on key areas such as advanced mobility solutions and sustainable water management. With a diverse range of leaders in attendance, Infraday California is set to be a critical event in shaping the future of infrastructure in the state. It will bring together individuals and organizations to strategize and innovate towards overcoming challenges, with significant emphasis on creating a sustainable and efficient infrastructure system.

news.headline: New Uponor ProPEX LF Brass Schedule 80 CPVC Adapters for commercial hybrid piping systems; announced in Orlando, FL on March 20, 2025 by GF Building Flow Solutions Americas. (Character count: 167)
news.summary: GF Building Flow Solutions Americas, formerly Uponor North America, recently introduced the Uponor ProPEX® LF Brass Schedule 80 CPVC Adapters at the city of Orlando on March 20, 2025. This solution offers an efficient option for commercial hybrid piping systems. The company is a leading global provider of Uponor-branded products.

news.headline: New Uponor ProPEX® LF Brass Transition Ball Valves offer design advantages in commercial piping projects. From Orlando, GF Building Flow introduces the product.
news.summary: GF Building Flow Solutions Americas, formerly Uponor North America, announced the launch of the new Uponor ProPEX® LF Brass Transition Ball Valves in Orlando, Florida on March 20, 2025. The valves offer significant design and installation benefits for commercial piping projects. With a focus on quality and efficiency, these valves aim to streamline processes in piping systems. This release reflects the company's commitment to innovation and customer satisfaction.

news.headline: PBS SoCal's Earth Month in 2025 will feature documentaries like SOCAL SNOWY OWL, WILDLIFE ON THE EDGE, THE FUTURE OF NATURE, and PATAGONIA: LIFE ON THE EDGE OF THE WORLD with local wildlife, premiering worldwide and in local events, narrated by actors such as Beau Bridges, Uma Thurman, and Pedro Pascal.
news.summary: In celebration of Earth Month, various exciting events are taking place. One of the highlights is the presentation of "Wildlife on the Edge," showcasing the famous mountain lion P-22 and other diverse wildlife in the Los Angeles mountains. The narration for this experience will be provided by Beau Bridges. Another special feature is "The Future of Nature," narrated by Uma Thurman, which sheds light on the upcoming prospects for nature conservation. Additionally, "Patagonia: Life on the Edge of the World" will be presented, with the narration done by Pedro Pascal. These events aim to raise awareness about environmental issues and the beauty of diverse wildlife.
